question: Describe the structure of the main steam and feedwater plenum.

nuscale_ch05_0025.title: References
nuscale_ch05_0025.summary: This section details the materials used in the construction of the pressurizer and its components in the NuScale reactor, specifying alloys and standards for each part to ensure corrosion resistance and compatibility with operating environments. It references relevant sections of the BPVC (Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code) and lists the specific alloys and material specifications for the baffle plate, heater bundles, cover plate, heater sheaths, and bolting.

nuscale_ch05_0013.title: References
nuscale_ch05_0013.summary: This section lists references and standards used in the NuScale Final Safety Analysis Report regarding the integrity of the reactor coolant boundary. It includes guidelines and reports from the Electric Power Research Institute and the American Society of Mechanical Engineers, as well as tables summarizing relevant ASME code cases for materials and components used in nuclear facility applications.

nuscale_ch05_0019.title: Reactor Coolant System Component and Subsystem Design
nuscale_ch05_0019.summary: This section describes the design of the NuScale Power Module’s Reactor Coolant System (RCS) components and subsystems, including the reactor pressure vessel, steam generators, safety and emergency valves, and associated piping. It details how the steam generators are integrated into the reactor vessel, forming part of the primary and secondary pressure boundaries, and references where further design information can be found in other report sections.

nuscale_ch05_0020.title: Steam Generators
nuscale_ch05_0020.summary: The steam generators (SGs) in the NuScale Power Module are integrated within the reactor pressure vessel (RPV), which also houses other key components such as the pressurizer, safety valves, and emergency cooling systems. The SG system includes feedwater and main steam piping, thermal relief valves, and access ports, with the RPV itself forming the outer pressure boundary for the SGs and their associated components.

edges.description: Section A references Section B by directing the reader to Section 5.2 for material descriptions of the RPV upper shell and upper head, which are detailed in Section B.
Section A provides specific material and component details for the pressurizer, which is one of the subsystems generally described as part of the reactor pressure vessel in Section B.

Section A provides detailed descriptions of the pressurizer and its materials, which are components within the broader reactor pressure vessel structure described in Section B, including the steam generators and other subsystems.

Section A provides references and standards that underpin the design and integrity requirements described in Section B's detailed description of the reactor coolant system components, including the main steam and feedwater plenum.

Section A provides references and standards that underpin the design and quality assurance requirements for reactor coolant boundary components, which include the main steam and feedwater plenum described structurally in Section B.

Section A provides a general overview of the reactor coolant system components, including the steam generators and associated plenums, while Section B focuses specifically on the steam generators, which are a subset of the components described in Section A.
